info.DAtuviSezaH: prAyeRa ayam anu-pUrvakaH eva prayuktaH dfSyate
info.english_meaning: to pitty to be compassionate to agree to approve to mourn to grieve to desire to wish
info.hindI_arTa: kfpAlu honA dayA karanA anumodana denA Soka karanA ronA cAhanA
